DP.571.0000:
Hey, konnichiwa!
Glad to meet you, guten tag!\f
I’m the Meister.\f
In this language’s parlance I would
be called a craftsman.\f
Something like that, n’est ce pas?
Comprendo?\f
DP.571.0001:
So, sniff, sniff, I smell you!
I smell something about you!\f
There is no question! You are a lover
of Pokémon just like me!\f
This is wunderbar!
So, this is what I will do.\f
I will power up your Pokédex so you
can read the descriptions of Pokémon\r
in other languages!\f
Je suis desolee, but not for all
Pokémon, however.\f
Only the Pokémon of countries, I,
the Meister, have visited.\f
Now, may I see your Pokédex?
So, I change this setting here...\r
Fool with this here... And done!\f
Now, you may read the descriptions
of the Meister’s Pokémon favorites\r
in other languages. How uber!
DP.571.0002:
Hey, konnichiwa!
Bonjour and all the rest!\f
Have you a Pokémon named FINNEON?
C’est un Pokémon fish-style?\f
If you will be so kind, trade it will
you for my precious MAGIKARP?
DP.571.0003:
Danke schon, arigato, gracias,
and what-have-you!\f
That MAGIKARP, it accompanied me from
the country of my birth.\f
Be good to it, I beseech you!
DP.571.0004:
Oh, non, non! That is no FINNEON!
What I want is a FINNEON!\r
You have made the Meister melancholy!
DP.571.0005:
Oh! This is a tragedy!
A tragedy, I tell you!\f
But one day, you will trade me
the Pokémon I want!\f
The Meister knows this because I have
traveled the world!
DP.571.0006:
Because there are Pokémon, I can
make friends anywhere in the world.\f
It so inspires me knowing that.
It’s so wonderful in a wonderful way!
DP.571.0007:
It’s a poster that lists the names
of Pokémon.\f
The world-traveling Meister’s
favorite Pokémon list.\f
EKANS[0203,0046]PIKACHU[0203,008C]PSYDUCK
PONYTA[0203,0046]STARYU[0203,008C]MAGIKARP\r
WOBBUFFET[0203,0046]HERACROSS[0203,008C]SNEASEL\r
TEDDIURSA[0203,0046]HOUNDOUR[0203,008C]WINGULL\r
SLAKOTH[0203,0046]ROSELIA
